summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EasyLeaz website updates: landing page restructure, vehicle catalog migration to /catalogue, new About and FAQ sections, and backend vehicle filtering. All major features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/vehicles returns all active vehicles
Backend: GET /api/vehicles?condition=occasion returns only occasion vehicles (6 vehicles)
Backend: GET /api/vehicles?condition=neuf returns only neuf vehicles (2 vehicles)
Backend: GET /api/cms/about returns about section with correct content
Backend: GET /api/cms/faq returns FAQ section with 10 questions
Backend: GET /api/cms/vehicle_cta returns vehicle CTA section content
Frontend: Landing page loads with correct section order (Hero → Vehicle CTA → About → Process → Leasing Form → FAQ → Contact → Footer)
Frontend: Vehicle CTA section shows 'CHOISISSEZ VOTRE VÉHICULE' title and 'Voir le catalogue' button
Frontend: Click 'Voir le catalogue' button navigates to /catalogue successfully
Frontend: About section displays with 'QUI SOMMES-NOUS ?' title and EasyLeaz content
Frontend: FAQ section shows 10 questions with working accordion functionality
Frontend: FAQ questions expand and collapse correctly on click
Frontend: No vehicle cards/slider present on landing page (correctly removed)
Frontend: Navbar 'Catalogue' link navigates to /catalogue page
Frontend: Catalog page loads with 2 tabs ('Nos véhicules d'occasion' and 'Nos véhicules neufs')
Frontend: Default tab is 'occasion' showing used vehicles
Frontend: Switching to 'neuf' tab shows new vehicles and updates URL to ?type=neuf
Frontend: Occasion tab header shows 'Nos véhicules d'occasion' + subtitle
Frontend: Neuf tab header shows 'Nos véhicules neufs' + subtitle
Frontend: Sort dropdown works with all options (price, year, mileage, monthly)
Frontend: Vehicle cards display correctly with price, monthly payment, and specs
Frontend: 'Retour au site' button navigates back to landing page
Frontend: Vehicle CTA buttons on cards work correctly
Frontend: FAQ navbar link scrolls to FAQ section correctly
